steps.title: Identify the preceding claim
steps.content: The passage states that Indigenous-led centers “contrast with museums that aren't Indigenous-led.” This comparison is established but awaits explanation.

steps.title: Determine the function of the underlined portion
steps.content:
The underlined portion elaborates by specifying how non-Indigenous museums operate: they target non-Indigenous audiences and rely on Euro-centric exhibit design.

The other options misidentify this function as definition, response to criticism, or exception to a principle.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
